fun plan(workspace: String, transcriptPath: String, reviewPlanPath: String): SecurityGatherResult {
    val repoContextReadme = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/README.md")
    val repoContextIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/index.md")
    val repoMaintenance = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val repoGeneratedIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val engineeringPrinciples = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val agentTranscript = readFile(transcriptPath)
    val preflightPlan = readFile(reviewPlanPath)
    val changedFileList = gitChangedFiles(workspace)
    val changedSourceSnippets = readChangedSourceFiles(workspace, changedFileList)
    val securityRelevantSymbols = extractSecurityRelevantSymbols(changedSourceSnippets)
    val sourceSinkCatalog = buildSourceSinkCatalog(securityRelevantSymbols, engineeringPrinciples)
    val cedarToolCalls = extractToolCalls(agentTranscript)
    val cedarPolicy = loadCedarPolicy("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/playbooks/security/cedar-tool-call-policy.md")
    val cedarAudit = runCedarToolCallAudit(cedarPolicy, cedarToolCalls, preflightPlan)
    val guardiansConfig = loadGuardiansConfig("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/playbooks/security/guardians-taint-config.md")
    val guardiansInputs = buildGuardiansInputs(changedSourceSnippets, sourceSinkCatalog, guardiansConfig)
    val guardiansTaintReport = runGuardiansTaintAnalysis(guardiansInputs)
    val sourceBackedFindings = correlateSecurityEvidence(cedarAudit, guardiansTaintReport, changedSourceSnippets, repoContextReadme, repoContextIndex, repoMaintenance, repoGeneratedIndex)
    val verdict = fuseSecurityVerdict(sourceBackedFindings)
    return makeSecurityGatherResult(verdict)
}
